tests.scenario: Sleepcast continues after screen lock on Android
steps: Open Headspace on Android and navigate to Sleep > Sleepcasts
Start any Sleepcast
Lock the screen within 5 seconds of starting
tests.expected_result: Audio continues playing after the screen locks with no pause or volume change.

tests.scenario: Sleep sound plays through notification interrupt
steps: Play a sleep sound track from the Sounds library
Send a notification to the device from another app
tests.expected_result: Sleep sound audio continues at the same volume when the notification banner appears.

tests.scenario: Sleep timer stops audio at configured time with fade
steps: Set sleep timer to 3 minutes and start a Sleepcast
Monitor audio for 3.5 minutes
tests.expected_result: Audio begins fading at the 3-minute mark and is fully silent by 3 minutes 30 seconds.

tests.scenario: Sleep timer does not stop early
steps: Configure sleep timer to 90 minutes
Verify audio is still playing at 60 minutes without user interaction
tests.expected_result: Audio is still playing 60 minutes into the session and has not ended before the configured 90-minute timer.

tests.scenario: Downloaded Sleepcast plays in airplane mode
steps: Download a Sleepcast while on Wi-Fi
Enable airplane mode
Open and play the downloaded Sleepcast
tests.expected_result: Playback begins within 3 seconds and continues without interruption or network error.

tests.scenario: Undownloaded content shows clear error offline
steps: Enable airplane mode
Attempt to play a Sleepcast that has not been downloaded
tests.expected_result: App displays a clear message stating the session is not downloaded and cannot play offline, rather than a generic crash or blank screen.

tests.scenario: Streak preserved when session completed offline
steps: Disable network access on the device
Complete a meditation session while offline
Restore network access and reopen the app
tests.expected_result: The session syncs after connectivity is restored and the streak counter is not decremented.

tests.scenario: Local session count matches server after sync
steps: Complete 3 sessions while offline
Restore connectivity
Check session history count on the server via account page
tests.expected_result: All 3 offline sessions appear in session history and the total count matches the expected value.

tests.scenario: Completed beginner course removed from top 5 recommendations
steps: Complete all 10 sessions of the Basics beginner course
Open the home feed the next day
tests.expected_result: The completed Basics course does not appear in the top 5 recommended items on the home screen.

tests.scenario: Intermediate course appears post-beginner completion
steps: Mark a beginner course as complete
Check the recommendation feed for intermediate-tagged content
tests.expected_result: At least 2 items in the recommendation feed are tagged as intermediate or advanced level.

tests.scenario: Subscription activates immediately on Android after iOS purchase
steps: Purchase a subscription on an iOS device
Within 60 seconds open the app on an Android device
Attempt to access premium content
tests.expected_result: Premium content is accessible on Android within 60 seconds of the iOS purchase without sign-out or manual refresh.

tests.scenario: Web purchase activates on Android within 60 seconds
steps: Purchase subscription on the Headspace website
Within 60 seconds open the Android app
tests.expected_result: Premium content is available immediately without a sign-in prompt.

tests.scenario: App authenticates on MDM-enrolled Android device
steps: Install Headspace on an Android device enrolled in an enterprise MDM profile
Open the app and attempt to sign in with a personal Headspace account
tests.expected_result: Sign-in completes successfully and the home screen loads without MDM conflict errors.

tests.scenario: Content plays on MDM-enrolled device
steps: Authenticate on an MDM-enrolled Android device
Navigate to any meditation session and press play
tests.expected_result: Audio plays without MDM-related permission errors or audio output failures.

tests.scenario: Push notification delivered within 5 minutes of configured time
steps: Set a daily reminder to 08:00
Wait until 08:05 on the following day and check the notification drawer
tests.expected_result: A Headspace reminder notification is present in the notification drawer by 08:05.

tests.scenario: Notification delivered on day with poor connectivity
steps: Configure daily reminder for a specific time
At that time disable and re-enable Wi-Fi to simulate poor connectivity
Check notification drawer within 5 minutes of reminder time
tests.expected_result: Notification is still delivered within the 5-minute window despite intermittent connectivity.

tests.scenario: Bluetooth reconnects automatically after brief dropout
steps: Connect Bluetooth headphones and start a meditation session
Briefly move headphones out of range for 5 seconds then back into range
tests.expected_result: Audio resumes automatically from the same position within 3 seconds of Bluetooth re-connection, without user action.

tests.scenario: Bluetooth audio plays for full session without manual reconnection
steps: Connect paired Bluetooth speaker and start a 30-minute guided meditation
Monitor session without touching the device
tests.expected_result: Audio plays continuously on the Bluetooth speaker for the full 30 minutes without requiring manual reconnection.

tests.scenario: Landscape layout renders on 7-inch tablet
steps: Open Headspace on an Android tablet with screen diagonal of at least 7 inches
Rotate to landscape orientation
tests.expected_result: UI renders in a two-column layout with no cropped elements, portrait-locked screens, or overflow.

tests.scenario: All primary screens support landscape on tablet
steps: On a tablet in landscape mode navigate through Home, Sleep, Meditate, and Profile screens
tests.expected_result: Each screen renders in a proper landscape layout on all 4 primary sections without falling back to portrait.

tests.scenario: Sleep category shows 10+ sessions in non-English language
steps: Change language to Spanish in app settings
Navigate to the Sleep content category
tests.expected_result: At least 10 distinct sleep sessions are listed in Spanish in the Sleep category.

tests.scenario: Meditation category shows 10+ sessions in French
steps: Set language to French
Navigate to the Meditation category
tests.expected_result: At least 10 distinct guided meditation sessions appear in French.

tests.scenario: Intermediate filter shows only intermediate sessions
steps: Complete at least one beginner course
Open the content filter and select Intermediate
tests.expected_result: All sessions shown are tagged as intermediate; no beginner-tagged sessions appear in the filtered result.

tests.scenario: Intermediate filter is accessible to beginner completers
steps: Complete a beginner course
Navigate to the Browse or Explore section
Check available filter options
tests.expected_result: An Intermediate filter option is visible and selectable in the filter panel.
